content.problemStatement:
Chef recently started selling a special fruit.

He has been selling the fruit for XXX rupees (XXX is a multiple of 100100100). He earns a profit of YYY rupees on selling the fruit currently.

Chef decided to increase the selling price by 10%10\%10%. Please help him calculate his new profit after the increase in selling price.

Note that only the selling price has been increased and the buying price is same.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single line of input containing two space-separated integers XXX and YYY denoting the initial selling price and the profit respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer, denoting the new profit.
constraints: 100 <= X <= 1000, X is a multiple of 100
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains two space‑separated integers X and Y, where X is the initial selling price (a multiple of 100) and Y is the current profit.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single integer on its own line – the new profit after increasing the selling price by 10 %.

solution.approach: The buying price of the fruit is X - Y. After a 10 % increase, the new selling price becomes X + X/10 (X is a multiple of 100, so X/10 is integer). New profit = (X + X/10) - (X - Y) = X/10 + Y. Hence for each test case we simply compute ans = Y + X/10 and output it.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – constant work per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used.

code.Python3:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys

def main():
    data = sys.stdin.read().strip().split()
    if not data:
        return
    it = iter(data)
    T = int(next(it))
    out_lines = []
    for _ in range(T):
        X = int(next(it))
        Y = int(next(it))
        ans = Y + X // 10
        out_lines.append(str(ans))
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out_lines))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
